nav.menuSlogan: From idea to launch. One team.

hero.headline: We build digital products for P2P, community, hospitality, conversion, agritech and sporttech businesses.
hero.subheadline: Not just websites. We combine design, development, and marketing — with deep knowledge of the industries we work in. From strategy to launch and beyond.

services.title: Design, development & marketing
services.subtitle: We cover the full digital cycle. Landing pages, corporate sites, startups, MVPs, e-commerce, SaaS, mobile apps, and redesigns that perform.

cmsApi.title: CMS API Integration
cmsApi.description: Connect your existing website to Ortvest CMS. Form submissions go directly to your Orders dashboard.

industries.title: We know your industry.
industries.subtitle: We don't build generic products. We work in specific industries where we understand the logic, the users, and the real challenges.
industries.logisticsNote: We also work with logistics startups and SMEs building fleet management, shipment tracking, and route optimization platforms.

p2p.title: P2P Platforms
p2p.description: We build peer-to-peer platforms where trust is the product. Sharing, rental, and exchange platforms with verification, escrow payments, item tracking, and dispute resolution — built so strangers can transact with confidence.

community.title: Community
community.description: We design and build private networks, club platforms, and professional communities where engagement feels natural — not forced. Real-time messaging, member roles, events, and content in one place. We know the difference between a "website" and a "platform where people actually return."

hospitality.title: Hospitality
hospitality.description: From yacht clubs to boutique hotels — hospitality businesses need digital experiences as premium as their service. We build booking systems, club management platforms, and guest-facing products where every detail matters. We've built for yacht clubs and sailing communities — we know this world.

conversion.title: Conversion Websites
conversion.description: A website that looks good but doesn't convert is a liability. We build landing pages and corporate websites for tech and fintech startups in Europe and the US — with UX strategy, conversion copywriting direction, and analytics setup baked in from day one.

logistics.title: Logistics
logistics.description: Working with logistics startups and SMEs on fleet management, shipment tracking, and route optimization. Two cases live — more in progress.

agritech.title: Agritech
agritech.description: Building platforms for farm management, crop analytics, and supply chain visibility. If you're working in this space — let's talk before we publish the cases.

sporttech.title: Sporttech
sporttech.description: Platforms for athlete tracking, club management, and fan engagement. Great digital products in sports are still rare — we're here to change that.

technologies.title: Technologies we use
technologies.subtitle: Modern stack for scalable, maintainable products.
technologies.leadersTrust: The same stack powers Google, Meta, Netflix, and thousands of product teams worldwide. We build on proven, production-ready tools.

process.title: From idea to launch
process.subtitle: A clear process. No surprises.
process.step4MarketingDesc: Only if you need it. SEO, analytics, campaigns.

about.title: We start from business goals, not Figma files
about.subtitle: Before jumping into design or code, we study your product, audience, and business objectives. That's why our solutions convert. We work like an external digital team — taking ownership from strategy to launch and support.
about.why1: We understand the business before we design or build.
about.why2: We take a limited number of projects to maintain quality and focus.
about.why3: We work with clients in Europe, USA, and Ukraine.

faq.title: Common questions
faq.subtitle: Clear answers to help you decide.
faq.a1: We cover design, development and marketing within one team.
faq.q2: What types of companies do you work with?
faq.a2: We work with companies building P2P platforms, community networks, hospitality products, and conversion-focused websites. We also take on logistics startup projects. Our clients are typically based in Europe and the US — from early-stage startups to established businesses launching new digital products.
faq.q3: Can I order only one service?
faq.a3: Yes. You can work with us on design, development or marketing separately.
faq.a4: Pricing depends on scope, complexity and timeline. We prepare an individual estimate after a short discovery call.
faq.a5: No. We always match the scope to your project needs. You can choose design, development, marketing or any combination.
faq.q6: What does the collaboration process look like?
faq.a6: Discovery, design, development, optional marketing, launch and support.
faq.q7: Do you offer support after launch?
faq.a7: Yes. We provide ongoing support, improvements and scaling if needed.
faq.q8: How do I start working with you?
faq.a8: Simply contact us through the form and we will get back to you shortly.

contact.title: Tell us about your project
contact.subtitle: Share your goals and challenges. We'll show relevant cases and discuss the best approach for launch and growth.

consultation.subtitle: Start with a free discovery call or book a detailed strategy session for complex products.

discovery.title: Discovery Call
discovery.subtitle: Not sure where to start? Let's figure it out - no pitch, no pressure.

strategy.title: Strategy Session
strategy.subtitle: Most projects fail before a single line of code is written. This session prevents that.

items.credit: Amount is credited toward the project if you proceed

meta.title: YachtMate — Private Yacht Club Network | Ortvest
meta.description: How Ortvest built a secure member network with verification, real-time messaging, events, and role-based access for yacht clubs.

hero.subtitle: A private social network for yacht club members — secure communication, events, and a verified member directory in one place.

yachtmate.challenge: Yacht clubs needed a closed network where high-profile members could communicate without exposing personal data on public channels. The challenge: real-time messaging, member verification, and event coordination — all behind strict privacy controls.
yachtmate.solution: We built YachtMate as an exclusive platform with member verification, role-based permissions, real-time chat, and event tools. React and Node.js power low-latency messaging while keeping member data private and access-controlled.

features.subtitle: Core mechanics that keep a private club network secure and useful day to day.

verification.title: Member verification
verification.description: Invite-only onboarding and identity checks so only verified club members get access.

messaging.title: Real-time messaging
messaging.description: Private channels and direct messages with low-latency delivery for active communities.

events.title: Event coordination
events.description: Create, share, and RSVP to club events without leaving the platform.

directory.title: Member directory
directory.description: Searchable profiles with roles and contact preferences controlled by each member.

privacy.title: Privacy controls
privacy.description: Granular visibility settings so members choose what the club can see.

roles.title: Role-based access
roles.description: Admins, officers, and members each see the tools and data relevant to their role.

brand.title: Brand & Identity
brand.description: We started with the brand — logo, color palette, typography, and visual language that reflects the premium, close-knit nature of a private yacht club.

design.title: UX & Design
design.description: Designed the full platform experience — member profiles, real-time chat, event management, and admin dashboard. Every screen was built around trust and simplicity.

development.title: Development
development.description: Built a full-stack platform with real-time messaging, role-based access, and a private event system. Deployed and ready for real members from day one.

meta.title: SharingGround — P2P Item Sharing Platform | Ortvest
meta.description: How Ortvest built a peer-to-peer sharing platform with user verification, escrow payments, item tracking, and insurance integration.

hero.subtitle: A peer-to-peer platform that lets people lend and borrow items within their community — with built-in trust, tracking, and secure payments.

sharingground.challenge: Building a P2P sharing platform where strangers trust each other with their belongings. The core problem: how do you create accountability, prevent fraud, and handle disputes — without being the middleman for every transaction?
sharingground.solution: We built a trust layer from the ground up — identity verification, item condition logging, insurance integration, and a transparent review system. Payments are held in escrow and released only when both sides confirm the exchange.

features.subtitle: The product mechanics that make community sharing work at scale.

verification.title: User verification
verification.description: Identity checks and profile trust scores to establish accountability between strangers.

tracking.title: Item tracking
tracking.description: Condition logs before and after each exchange with photo evidence and timestamps.

escrow.title: Escrow payments
escrow.description: Funds held securely and released only after both parties confirm the completed exchange.

reviews.title: Review system
reviews.description: Two-way reviews that build trust over time and surface reliable community members.

insurance.title: Insurance integration
insurance.description: Optional item insurance for high-value goods — embedded directly in the listing flow.

messaging.title: In-app messaging
messaging.description: Secure chat between borrower and lender without exposing personal contact details.

design.title: UX & Design
design.description: Designed the complete borrower and lender flows — from listing an item to completing an exchange. Trust signals were built into every screen.

development.title: Development
development.description: Built the full platform — identity verification, escrow payment logic, item condition logging with photo evidence, two-way review system, and in-app messaging.

meta.title: ProfitCraft — Credit-Building Website | Ortvest
meta.description: How Ortvest designed and built a conversion-focused website for a US credit-building service targeting newcomers.

hero.subtitle: A trust-first marketing website that explains credit growth paths and drives sign-ups for newcomers to the US financial system.

profitcraft.challenge: Newcomers to the US often don't know how credit unlocks loans, housing, and business growth. ProfitCraft needed a site that builds trust fast, explains complex financial concepts simply, and converts visitors into leads.
profitcraft.solution: We designed a clear narrative structure — problem, path, proof, action — with strong typography, trust signals, and focused CTAs. The site explains services without jargon and guides users toward consultation or sign-up.

features.subtitle: Conversion patterns that turn complex financial topics into confident action.

valueProp.title: Clear value proposition
valueProp.description: Headlines and sections that immediately answer why credit-building matters now.

trust.title: Trust signals
trust.description: Social proof, credentials, and reassurance blocks placed at decision points.

paths.title: Service paths
paths.description: Structured journeys for loans, auto, home, and business — each with dedicated messaging.

leads.title: Lead capture
leads.description: Forms and CTAs tuned for low friction without sacrificing lead quality.

responsive.title: Responsive layout
responsive.description: Consistent experience across mobile and desktop where most research happens.

seo.title: SEO foundation
seo.description: Semantic structure and metadata so organic traffic finds the right pages.

strategy.title: Strategy & Copy Direction
strategy.description: Mapped the target audience — newcomers unfamiliar with the US credit system. Built the messaging around trust, simplicity, and a clear path from zero to a working credit score.

design.title: Design
design.description: Designed a clean, trust-first landing page where every section answers a specific objection a newcomer might have before signing up.

development.title: Development
development.description: Built a fast, SEO-optimised website with conversion-focused structure, analytics integration, and smooth CTA flows.

meta.title: Ski&Sail Club — Yacht Trip Booking Platform | Ortvest
meta.description: How Ortvest built a yacht club platform for route discovery, trip booking, and community management.

hero.subtitle: A digital home for a yacht and ski travel club — discover routes, book trips, and stay connected with the community.

skisailclub.challenge: The club needed one platform for newcomers and experienced sailors — trip discovery, booking, and community — while capturing the emotional side of yachting: freedom, scenery, and adventure.
skisailclub.solution: We built a fast Next.js platform with immersive visuals, clear booking flows, and member profiles. Route pages, trip management, and community features live in a single cohesive experience ready to scale.

features.subtitle: Booking and community tools that reflect the spirit of sailing.

routes.title: Route discovery
routes.description: Browse yacht routes with rich imagery, details, and availability at a glance.

booking.title: Trip booking
booking.description: Streamlined reservation flow from discovery to confirmation.

community.title: Member community
community.description: Profiles and club updates that keep members engaged between trips.

profiles.title: Member profiles
profiles.description: Personal pages with sailing history and club participation.

content.title: Immersive UI
content.description: Visual design that translates sunsets, open water, and adventure into digital form.

performance.title: Performance & scale
performance.description: Fast loads and a stack ready to grow as the club adds routes and members.

design.title: UX & Design
design.description: Designed a platform that serves two audiences — first-timers exploring sailing and experienced members managing trips. Clean, premium, effortless.

development.title: Development
development.description: Built the booking engine, member area, trip management system, and community features. Integrated with payment processing for trip deposits.

meta.title: Navexa — Logistics Management Platform | Ortvest
meta.description: How Ortvest built a logistics platform for fleet tracking, route optimization, and shipment monitoring. NDA project.

hero.subtitle: A unified logistics platform for fleet tracking, route optimization, and shipment monitoring — plus marketing to support client acquisition and product positioning.

navexa.challenge: A logistics company needed one system to see fleet position, optimize routes, and monitor shipments — replacing spreadsheets and disconnected tools with real-time operational visibility. They also needed marketing support to present the product clearly and attract new B2B clients.
navexa.solution: We delivered a custom dashboard integrating GPS data, route optimization, and shipment analytics, alongside marketing materials and messaging that explain the platform's value to fleet operators and logistics teams.

features.subtitle: Operational tools that connect fleet, routes, and shipments in one view.

fleet.title: Fleet overview
fleet.description: Live map and status for every vehicle in the fleet.

tracking.title: Real-time tracking
tracking.description: GPS integration for accurate position and ETA updates.

routes.title: Route optimization
routes.description: Smarter routing that reduces cost and delivery time.

analytics.title: Operations analytics
analytics.description: Dashboards for KPIs, delays, and fleet utilization.

shipments.title: Shipment monitoring
shipments.description: End-to-end visibility from pickup to delivery.

integrations.title: Device integrations
integrations.description: Connects with GPS hardware and existing logistics workflows.

development.title: Platform Development
development.description: Built an end-to-end logistics platform connecting fleet management, route optimization, and real-time shipment tracking into one unified system.

meta.title: Teya Logistics — Company Landing Page | Ortvest
meta.description: How Ortvest designed and developed a modern logistics landing page focused on lead generation and clear service presentation.

hero.subtitle: A modern landing page for a logistics company — clear services, strong branding, and a simple path to request a quote.

teya.challenge: Teya needed to present transportation services clearly, build trust with new clients, and convert visitors into quote requests — without overwhelming them with logistics jargon.
teya.solution: We designed and built a responsive landing page with focused service blocks, company advantages, and prominent contact CTAs. The layout guides visitors from understanding to action in a few scrolls.

features.subtitle: Marketing patterns that turn traffic into qualified leads.

services.title: Service presentation
services.description: Clear blocks for each transportation offering with scannable copy.

branding.title: Strong branding
branding.description: Visual identity applied consistently across hero, sections, and footer.

leads.title: Lead generation
leads.description: Quote and contact flows placed where intent peaks.

responsive.title: Fully responsive
responsive.description: Polished layout on mobile where many B2B buyers first research.

trust.title: Trust building
trust.description: Credentials, coverage areas, and proof points that reduce hesitation.

contact.title: Easy contact
contact.description: Multiple touchpoints — form, phone, and quick inquiry — without friction.

design.title: Design
design.description: Designed a bold, professional website that clearly communicates the company's services and builds trust with potential clients from the first scroll.

development.title: Development
development.description: Built a fast, conversion-optimised website with lead capture forms, analytics setup, and SEO foundation.

meta.title: Pachaca — On-Demand Cleaning Platform | Ortvest
meta.description: How Ortvest built a full-stack cleaning service platform with iOS and Android apps, a web booking service, and an internal operations CMS.

hero.subtitle: A full-stack cleaning and dry-cleaning service platform — mobile apps, web service, and an internal management system built from scratch.

pachaca.challenge: Pachaca needed to digitise an on-demand cleaning and dry-cleaning business across multiple Ukrainian cities — giving customers a fast mobile booking experience while giving the operations team real-time control over orders, cleaners, and service areas.
pachaca.solution: We built the entire digital stack from scratch: native iOS and Android apps for customers, a full web service for desktop users, and a custom internal CMS tailored to how the Pachaca team manages daily operations.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Pachaca is an on-demand cleaning and dry-cleaning service operating across multiple cities in Ukraine. Customers book professional cleaning for apartments, furniture, and clothing — quickly and entirely online. We built the entire digital infrastructure: customer-facing mobile apps, a web service, and an internal operations system.

mobile.title: Mobile Apps — iOS & Android
mobile.description: Native mobile apps for iOS and Android built around speed and simplicity — choose a service, pick a time, confirm the booking in under a minute. Push notifications keep customers informed at every step, from confirmation to the cleaner arriving at the door.

web.title: Web Service
web.description: A full web service giving desktop users the same seamless booking experience — service selection, scheduling, address management, order history, and payment processing. Built for speed, optimised for conversion.

cms.title: Internal Management System
cms.description: A custom internal CMS giving the Pachaca operations team full control — managing orders, assigning cleaners, tracking service areas, and monitoring real-time status across all cities. Built for how the team actually works.

meta.title: Mie — AI Smart Shopping List | Ortvest
meta.description: How Ortvest built an AI-powered shopping app with inventory tracking, recipe suggestions, and smart reminders. NDA project.

hero.subtitle: An intelligent shopping list that tracks pantry inventory, suggests recipes, and reminds you what to buy — powered by AI.

mie.challenge: Shopping lists fail when they don't reflect what's actually in the pantry. Mie needed to track inventory intelligently, reduce waste, and suggest what to buy based on habits and recipes.
mie.solution: We built a React Native app with AI-driven inventory tracking, recipe matching from available ingredients, and smart reminders. The system learns shopping patterns to optimize grocery trips over time.

features.subtitle: AI features that make grocery planning feel effortless.

inventory.title: Pantry tracking
inventory.description: Know what's in stock and what's running low without manual spreadsheets.

ai.title: AI suggestions
ai.description: Smart recommendations based on habits, seasonality, and usage patterns.

recipes.title: Recipe matching
recipes.description: Suggest meals you can cook with ingredients already on hand.

reminders.title: Smart reminders
reminders.description: Timely nudges before you run out of essentials.

patterns.title: Pattern learning
patterns.description: Adapts to how often you buy and what you typically need.

lists.title: Unified lists
lists.description: One place for shopping, sharing, and checking off items on the go.

meta.title: [Re.] skin&hair — Brand Identity | Ortvest
meta.description: How Ortvest created a minimalist brand identity for a modern beauty line — logo, palette, typography, and packaging direction.

hero.subtitle: A minimalist brand system for a skin and hair care line — organic shapes, premium feel, and consistency across touchpoints.

reskin.challenge: A beauty brand entering a crowded market needed identity that feels premium and clean without cold minimalism — communicating quality and trust at first glance.
reskin.solution: We developed a full brand system: logo mark, color palette, typography, packaging direction, and usage guidelines. Organic shapes and warm neutrals balance modern simplicity with approachable luxury.

features.subtitle: Deliverables that form a cohesive, premium brand language.

logo.title: Logo system
logo.description: Primary mark and variations for product, packaging, and digital.

palette.title: Color palette
palette.description: Warm neutrals and accent tones that signal quality and calm.

typography.title: Typography
typography.description: Type pairing for headlines, body, and product labels.

packaging.title: Packaging direction
packaging.description: Layout principles for bottles, boxes, and retail presence.

guidelines.title: Brand guidelines
guidelines.description: Rules for spacing, color use, and tone across channels.

applications.title: Applications
applications.description: Mockups showing the system on web, social, and print.

brand.title: Brand Identity
brand.description: Developed the complete brand identity — logo, visual system, packaging direction, and brand guidelines for a clean, modern beauty brand.

meta.title: Gambit — Website UI Design | Ortvest
meta.description: How Ortvest designed a modern website UI with strong hierarchy, bold typography, and strategic whitespace.

hero.subtitle: A modern website UI with bold typography, clear hierarchy, and whitespace that guides attention — designed for impact and usability.

gambit.challenge: The site needed a visual refresh that feels contemporary and credible — improving scanability and conversion without losing brand recognition.
gambit.solution: We redesigned key pages with a strong type scale, consistent component library, and deliberate whitespace. Every section has a clear hierarchy so users know where to look and what to do next.

features.subtitle: Design decisions that balance aesthetics with usability.

hierarchy.title: Visual hierarchy
hierarchy.description: Clear levels of headline, subhead, and body that guide the eye.

typography.title: Bold typography
typography.description: Expressive type choices that reinforce brand personality.

whitespace.title: Strategic whitespace
whitespace.description: Breathing room that reduces noise and highlights CTAs.

components.title: UI components
components.description: Reusable cards, buttons, and sections for consistent implementation.

responsive.title: Responsive layouts
responsive.description: Grid and breakpoints planned for seamless dev handoff.

handoff.title: Dev-ready handoff
handoff.description: Organized Figma files with specs for efficient build.

design.title: UI Redesign
design.description: Redesigned the visual language — typography, spacing, hierarchy, and color — to create a site that commands attention and guides the visitor toward action.

development.title: Development
development.description: Implemented the new design with performance optimisation, smooth animations, and clean component structure.

meta.title: Navexa Logo — Brand Identity | Ortvest
meta.description: Logo design for Navexa logistics — navigation, precision, and versatile light and dark variations.

hero.subtitle: A professional logo for a logistics company — precision, navigation, and modern technology in a versatile mark.

navexa-logo.challenge: Navexa needed a logo that communicates navigation and operational precision — working on dashboards, vehicles, documents, and marketing in both light and dark contexts.
navexa-logo.solution: We created a minimalist mark with clean geometry and color variations for digital products and print. The system scales from favicon to fleet branding without losing clarity.

features.subtitle: Logo system built for logistics and product environments.

mark.description: Distinct symbol that reads at small sizes and large formats.

applications.title: Real applications
applications.description: Mockups on vehicles, uniforms, and digital interfaces.

meta.title: Ortvest Logo — Brand Identity | Ortvest
meta.description: Logo and brand mark for Ortvest IT studio — innovation, clarity, and scalable digital identity.

hero.subtitle: Brand mark for an IT studio — clean geometry, innovation, and variations built for product and corporate use.

ortvest-logo.challenge: Ortvest needed a logo that reflects modern software craftsmanship — clear at favicon size, strong on pitch decks, and consistent across product UIs and marketing.
ortvest-logo.solution: We designed a sleek mark with light and dark variations, strict geometry, and guidelines for digital-first use. The identity scales from app icons to large-format print without rework.

features.subtitle: A flexible identity for a product-focused IT studio.

analytics.name: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Financial overview — P&L and cash flow
analytics.feature1: P&L Statement and Cash Flow Statement side by side
analytics.feature2: Charts: Revenue vs Cash, Net Profit Trend, Orders by Status and Service
analytics.feature3: Filter by period: 7d / 30d / month / quarter / custom

blog.name: Blog
blog.subtitle: Create and publish content directly from your CMS
blog.feature1: Rich text editor with image uploads, headings, lists and formatting
blog.feature2: Post management: title, slug, tags, publish date, draft / published status
blog.feature4: Publishes to your website automatically via API
blog.dependency: Content is published to your website via the Ortvest API. Works for both your own blog and client websites built by Ortvest.

team.name: Team
team.subtitle: Manage admin accounts and permissions
team.feature1: Invite team members with role assignment (Member / Super Admin)
team.feature3: Full control over who can view, edit or delete

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your team. Upgrade or downgrade at any time.
pricing.subscribeNote: Secure payment via Stripe (test mode in development). You'll create your CMS account after checkout.
